semantic.role: Architectural constraints document for the layered architecture of the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Define separation of concerns between CLI, services, core, tasks, engines, and infra layers
Specify import and dependency rules to prevent layer violations
Provide severity levels (Error/Warning) for each constraint
Guide contributors on correct module responsibilities
outOfScope: Specific implementation details of any layer's internal code
Naming conventions or coding style beyond layer boundaries

English.purpose: This document establishes and enforces a layered architecture for the ArchSpine project. It defines clear boundaries between CLI, services, core, tasks, engines, and infra layers, ensuring that each layer adheres to its prescribed role: CLI as thin entrypoints, services for orchestration, core for pipeline contracts, tasks for stage-local work, engines for analysis and transformation, and infra for low-level capabilities.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine codebase. It serves as a reference for understanding the project's architectural vision, preventing architectural drift, and guiding code placement during development and code review.
key_takeaways: Maintain strict separation: CLI must not absorb logic from lower layers.
Services orchestrate but view-specific code belongs under src/services/view/.
Core is isolated from CLI, ensuring pipeline stability.
Engines are reusable and independent of presentation concerns.
Infra facades should be preferred over deep private imports.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为 ArchSpine 项目建立并强制执行分层架构约束。它清晰定义了 CLI、services、core、tasks、engines 和 infra 各层之间的边界，确保每层都履行其规定职责：CLI 仅作为薄入口，services 负责编排，core 定义流水线契约，tasks 实现阶段本地工作，engines 提供分析转换，infra 提供底层能力。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向所有参与 ArchSpine 代码库的开发者。它作为理解项目架构愿景的参考，帮助防止架构漂移，并在开发与代码评审中指导代码的合理放置。
key_takeaways: 保持严格分层：CLI 不得吸收来自下层逻辑。
Services 负责编排，但视图相关代码应位于 src/services/view/ 下。
Core 与 CLI 隔离，确保流水线稳定性。
Engines 是可复用的，不依赖表示层关注点。
优先使用 Infra 门面，而非深入私有实现路径。
